# Design Guidelines

> Copy from `docs/templates/` and customize for your brand.

## Tone & mood

`[e.g. Professional, friendly, minimal, playful]`

## Colors

| Token | Hex | Usage |
|-------|-----|-------|
| Primary | `#______` | CTA, links, key actions |
| Background | `#______` | Page background |
| Text | `#______` | Body copy |
| Accent / danger | `#______` | Errors, warnings, alerts |

## Typography

- Font family: `[e.g. system-ui, Inter]`
- Hero heading: `[size / weight]`
- Body: `[size / line-height]`

## Layout

- Approach: `[mobile-first recommended]`
- Max content width: `[e.g. 1200px]`
- Section order for landing: `[Hero → … → Footer]`

## Components

- **Primary button:** `[shape, size, hover behavior]`
- **Cards:** `[if used — spacing, shadow, radius]`
- **Forms:** `[label style, validation feedback]`
- **Chatbot:** `[position, must not cover CTA]`

## Responsive breakpoints

- Mobile: `320px+`
- Tablet: `768px+`
- Desktop: `1024px+`

## Sample copy (optional)

- Brand name: `[ ]`
- Tagline: `[ ]`
- Contact: `[ ]`
